items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the guest privileges, specifically the ability to bring a friend once per month. However, the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this feature. While the linked use case mentions guest privileges, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied or that any gaps were identified in the current implementation.
